# node_id: # node_id  : CRAQ node id used in runtime cluster config
# ssh_user : SSH user for remote VM login
# ssh_host : SSH endpoint for remote VM
# ssh_port : SSH port on remote VM (typically 22)
# node_host: Host/IP other CRAQ nodes should use to reach this node

ssh_user: use the same hostname for ssh_host and node_host.
